description: E31 - DAH reclass (using 2300 DAH to reclass 2008 DAH)

sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set Flex2 = Co, Co = '2999' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and Contract = 'DAH 2300'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, Contract, TTY, UWyr, Flex2, Amt1) (select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, '2999',(substring(GL,1,3) + '0001') as GL, [OffsetPC], [ForceTP2], '[OffsetBC]', ('[ContractPrefix] ' + TP) as Contract, TTY, UWyr, 'offset', round(0-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999')
update TransX set Amt1 = round(0-Amt1,2), GL = (substring(GL,1,6) + '1') where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,TTY,Amt1,Flex1) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,'4050500010' as PC,'2300' as TP,BusCat,'DAH' as Contract,UWYR,TTY,round(sum(Amt1),2),'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by Ledger,Co,GL,BusCat,UWYR,TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass4'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Txt = replace(Txt,'Elim','') where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TP = '', PC = '1402000755' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%0001'
